'''Tovric''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was employed as an [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-spanning conflict between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Biography==
He was hired to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Kollrin]] at the [[Ace of Sabres]], an upscale [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] establishment located on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kluistar]]. The attempt, however, was foiled by [[Dunan Par'Ell]], who was the head of security for the casino.
